strategy.name: Strategy Pattern
strategy.description: Struct with interface field(s) for strategy delegation

semaphores.description: Buffered channel with size 100 used as semaphore
semaphores.example: Channel of type 'unknown' with buffer size 100

potential_leaks.recommendation: Ensure proper exit conditions using context, channels, or other signaling mechanisms

performance_antipatterns.description: Resource acquisition without defer close
performance_antipatterns.suggestion: Use defer to ensure resource cleanup

performance_antipatterns.description: Method receiver is never referenced in method body
performance_antipatterns.suggestion: Use _ as receiver name or convert to plain function if receiver is not needed

performance_antipatterns.description: Method receiver is never referenced in method body
performance_antipatterns.suggestion: Use _ as receiver name or convert to plain function if receiver is not needed

performance_antipatterns.description: append() in loop without pre-allocation
performance_antipatterns.suggestion: Pre-allocate slice with make() for known capacity

file_name_issues.description: File name repeats package/directory name (e.g., http/http_client.go should be http/client.go)

identifier_issues.name: Renderer
identifier_issues.description: Exported name repeats package name (e.g., user.UserService should be user.Service)

suggestions: Consider splitting file - exceeds maximum line count
Too many functions - group related functions into separate files
Too many types - separate type definitions into focused files
Too many types - separate type definitions into focused files
Too many exported symbols - reduce public API surface
